weeklySummary.title: This week
weeklySummary.noWorkouts: No workouts this week yet. Get moving!
weeklySummary.tipRecovery: Your body needs rest! Consider a lighter week with mobility and stretching.
weeklySummary.tipConsistency: Fewer sessions than last week. Try scheduling fixed training days for better routine.
weeklySummary.tipVariety: You've only trained one body part. Mix it up for a more balanced routine.
weeklySummary.tipRest: Strong week! Remember to give your body recovery time before pushing again.
weeklySummary.tipChallenge: Workouts feel easy! Consider increasing weight or trying next-level exercises.
weeklySummary.tipKeepItUp: Amazing week! You're training consistently and feeling great. Keep it up!
weeklySummary.tipGeneral: Set a goal for next week – maybe an extra session or trying a new exercise?
